# Enterprise Operating System (EOS)

## Master AI Development Instructions

This repository follows a modular AI instruction system.

All AI assistants working on this repository must treat the following files as the primary engineering standards:

* `ai-rules/01-project-vision.md`
* `ai-rules/02-engineering-standards.md`

Additional rule files will be added as the project evolves.

Before implementing any feature:

1. Read the applicable engineering standards.
2. Read the current implementation plan from `docs/implementation-plans/`.
3. Preserve the existing architecture.
4. Never redesign completed modules unless explicitly instructed.
5. Prefer scalable, reusable, enterprise-grade implementations.
6. Maintain compatibility with existing Metadata Engine, Relationship Engine, Knowledge Studio, AI Platform, Governance Platform, and Workflow Platform.
7. Update documentation when architecture changes.

Implementation plans are the authoritative specification for new work.
